name: MOM Generator
description: Transform raw meeting notes, transcripts, or bullet points into a professional Minutes of Meeting document with attendees, decisions, and action items.
author: accilium
example_input: Meeting 2026-07-01, attendees: SK, NM, TW. Discussed Q3 budget overrun of 40k, agreed to freeze travel spend. NM to present revised forecast by July 10. TW raised hiring pause concern - parked for next meeting.
